scope: Pass B full-surface expansion generated from the official OpenAPI spec at https://api.gitbook.com/openapi.json. 185 streams cover JSON GET operations; 170 write actions cover JSON or no-body POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE operations. Streaming text/event-stream GETs and a root-array write body are excluded with specific closed-vocabulary reasons.

excluded.reason: response media type is text/event-stream; the declarative reader extracts JSON records only
